dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses multi-timeframe confirmation (daily 50-MA and weekly 200-MA). Mapped 50-period MA to sma_50 (daily) and 200-period MA to sma_200 (weekly equivalent). ADX > 20 confirms trend presence. Stop loss set to 2.5x ATR as specified in parameters, converted to 2.5% as decimal equivalent. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT so both LONG and SHORT entry conditions provided based on trend direction. Exit on MA crossunder for trend reversal confirmation.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses multi-timeframe confirmation (daily 50-MA and weekly 200-MA). Mapped 50-period MA to sma_50 (daily) and 200-period MA to sma_200 (weekly equivalent). ADX > 20 confirms trend presence. Stop loss set to 2.5x ATR as specified in parameters, converted to 2.5% as decimal equivalent. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT so both LONG and SHORT entry conditions provided based on trend direction. Exit on MA crossunder for trend reversal confirmation.

source_rule_text: A trader should adopt a big-picture perspective on market direction, trade with the trend across multiple instruments while maintaining strict risk control, because this approach has structural validity regardless of market conditions.
